title: The War at Marineford Begins: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: CA... Captain Buggy!? Could it be...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You really are a prophet of God!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Who the hell is opening the gates?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: All men, to your battle stations !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's a huge fleet of pirate ships!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: NO!!! Whitebeard must be somewhere close!!!
